name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup defrosted frozen pineapple juice concentrate
2 egg whites (or egg replacer to equal)
2 lightly beaten egg white mixture (or egg replacer to equal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. In a medium bowl, mix honey, pineapple juice concentrate, vanilla, unbeaten egg white mixture (or egg replacer), grated carrots, carrot baby food puree, and raisins. Stir until just blended.
4. Stir in lightly beaten egg white mixture (or egg replacer). Do not overmix.
5. Spoon batter into two 9-inch round nonstick baking pans.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
7. Cool on wire racks for 20-30 minutes, then remove from pans.
